context: Tests that agent scrolls the correct inner container rather than the window or outer page.

checklist.name: Obtains iframe frame object
checklist.description: Code calls page.frame({ name: 'microConsole-Logs' }) to get the CloudWatch iframe context

checklist.name: Does NOT use window.scrollBy or window.scrollTo
checklist.description: Code does not call window.scrollBy() or window.scrollTo() to perform the scroll

checklist.name: Does NOT use page.evaluate for CloudWatch content
checklist.description: Code does not call page.evaluate() to query CloudWatch DOM elements — uses frame.evaluate()

checklist.name: Targets logs-table__wrapper container
checklist.description: Code queries .logs-table__wrapper as the scroll target element

checklist.name: Sets scrollTop directly
checklist.description: Code sets .scrollTop = 600 (not scrollBy, not scrollIntoView) on the container

checklist.name: Uses frame.evaluate not page.evaluate
checklist.description: The evaluate call is on the frame object, not on page
